title: Omni-Loom
tagline: A deterministic generative compiler for cyber-physical creativity.
thesis: Creativity entering the physical world requires compiler-like systems rather than opaque improvisation. Omni-Loom transforms open-ended creative intent into reproducible, auditable fabrication pipelines — bridging generative algorithms and physical artifacts through deterministic lowering.
problem: Current AI systems excel at content generation but struggle with reproducibility, auditability, fabrication workflows, and deterministic outputs. The path from intent → geometry → artifact is fragmented across incompatible tools, manual handoffs, and opaque model outputs.
architecture: Intent Capture — structured input capturing creative direction, constraints, and material parameters
Job Compilation — validation, constraint propagation, and feasibility checks against fabrication domain
Tool Plan Generation — deterministic lowering of job manifest into tool-specific operations
Geometry Synthesis — procedural geometry generation using fabrication-aware primitives and tolerances
Artifact Emission — output formatting for target machines: laser, CNC, 3D print, or textile

pipeline.name: Intent Capture
pipeline.description: Structured input capturing creative direction, constraints, and material parameters.
pipeline.input: Natural language + reference images + material spec

pipeline.description: Validation, constraint propagation, and feasibility checks against fabrication domain.

demo.title: Live Compiler Demo
demo.description: Input a creative intent and watch Omni-Loom compile a verified tool plan and preview geometry in real time.

futureRoadmap: Phase 1: Validate compiler pipeline for laser-cut and CNC domains via micro-grant + client pilot
Phase 2: Expand to textile and additive manufacturing via arts + technology grant
Phase 3: Open-source core geometry kernel and design-system UI via Mozilla / NSF grant

roadmap.objective: Validate compiler pipeline for laser-cut and CNC domains
Expand to textile and additive manufacturing
Open-source core geometry kernel and design-system UI
